Video Games.body:
First played: Dec 2025
Playthroughs: 2
My shop is named 'Yaki Nomi Balls'

03/2025.body: Today I figured out how to automate these logs from google docs > google sheets > website. I?ve been piecing it together and finally got the front-end to work. I <3 JSON!!! Thank you, JSON!!! Now everytime I update this document it will push it automatically to my website. Isn?t that amazing?

Today my breakout boards for the PCM1794A DAC and opamp OPA1612 are supposed to come. But I don?t think they will. They haven?t been shipped out yet. Here is my shopping list for the electronics store:
- 5V to 3.3V buck converter/step-down converter
- Block terminals
- Breadboards
- 22 AWG gauge wire
- AC plugin wire

yesterday I went on a bike ride to URS electronics and got all the parts I needed. Reminder here that I must return and get larger terminals. now I am back at my desk job and will hopefully work on some more web dev stuff for uuutopiaaa.baby

I got my breakout boards for the pcm1794a DAC and the opa1612 opamp. I have to solder them. I have soldered small components before, but nothing as small as these. I need to go to the store and see if they have:
Solder flux
Solder
Fine tip for a soldering gun
A regulated soldering gun with a temp gauge
Another breadboard
Capacitors
This past weekend, I found an audio preamp on the side of the road. I decided on a Hakko soldering iron that I should hopefully get by the end of the week. This preamp will be gutted to the heavens.

I successfully de-soldered two XLR ports from the preamp. I used my old $15 iron that is a pathetic nub. De-soldering components is addicting. As soon as I go home today I?m going to do as many more parts as I can before I become dizzily unable.
Hi im at a coffee shop with ethan

Yay ~ new commission from ethan to make a website for his personal portfolio. He is a music producer. I am excited to develop interactive audio components for his custom website. Yesterday I created a pixel-perfect replica of a windows95 window-container interface. I now know the so many delicious inset and outset shadows and highlights of old UI components.

It?s about 10 days into the commission. I?ve made successful progress in creating a custom audio player interface as well as other interactable UI elements in this wonderfully gray, blocky, nostalgic style. Suprisingly, I landed at using the Apple Music API to power it. Hopefully I?ll be done with the project in the next few days. It will be beautiful to create a documentation page. I cannot wait to share the whole project.

I saw a bald man in a barber shop getting his head shined. This was definitely the first time I?ve seen this occurrence live. The image lasted only a moment, but in my mind it will last a long time, I?m sure.

Last night I started a new save of Pok?mon FireRed. I played through all the games of this series except this one. 
My current team (in this order) is Mankey, Weedle, Wartortle , and Clefairy. I don?t like any of them. I?m hoping to encounter a better one soon.

05/2026.subheader: Today will mark the day of a new website restructure. I have more time on my hands, and I am very depressed. I have been playing 'Factorio' to breathe a new life.
